title: What we're launching?
lede: May 6th's milestone focused mostly on our agents. This milestone focuses on the way of working of agents & people — letting our customers embed agents in their day-to-day work with ease and trust.

tabs.title: Collaboration: People & agents
tabs.tagline: Agents become an essential part of your team's workflows — collaborating in a shared space, with the communication and context to get real work done together.

cards.title: Workspace 2.0
cards.description: A shared space where people and agents work from the same context, with a built-in project-manager agent.

cards.title: Shared chat
cards.description: In-context group chat across people and agents — same place, same context, no thread-hopping.

cards.title: Collaborative agents
cards.description: Share your agents with your team, so the whole team benefits from them.

cards.title: Agents in meetings
cards.description: Invite your agents to your meetings, where they pick up context, contribute information, and take action items.

tabs.title: Better agents
tabs.tagline: monday Agents get smarter and more capable — they remember your context, improve over time, and produce more of the deliverables your team needs.

cards.title: Improved agents
cards.description: Auto-save, versioning, memory, and better context, so your agents get sharper every time they work.

cards.title: A wider range of deliverables
cards.description: Beyond docs, agents now produce HTML, slides, canvas, and vibe apps.

tabs.title: Connect to ecosystem
tabs.tagline: Bring your own agents and tools, connect via MCP or open APIs — and get work done from anywhere, with your context always in sync.

cards.title: Work with monday in any tool
cards.description: Read, update, and act on monday from the AI tools you already use: Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Gemini, Microsoft Copilot, Slack, Make.

media.alt: Work with monday in any tool

cards.title: Bring your own agent to monday
cards.description: Connect the agents you already use (Claude, Codex, and more) as external agents that become team members — visible presence, assign and @mention.

cards.title: Built on extensive AI infrastructure
cards.description: It all runs on MCP and open APIs.

media.alt: Built on MCP and open APIs

tabs.title: Infra & foundation
tabs.tagline: The control, context, and infrastructure to run people and agents together — safely, and at scale.

cards.title: Govern every agent
cards.description: Admins get full visibility and control over every agent, monday and external: who can create and use them, granular permissions, and a full audit log.

cards.title: monday DB 3
cards.description: Our data platform scales for the hybrid teams of people and agents: up to 1M board items, with faster performance.

cards.title: Deeper context
cards.description: monday understands your team and its interactions better, with stronger memory.
